title: sync-agentic-tools configuration
description: Configuration file for sync-agentic-tools, a synchronisation tool for agentic coding tool configurations.

backup_retention_days.description: Number of days to retain backups.

backup_retention_count.description: Maximum number of backups to retain.

auto_cleanup_backups.description: Automatically clean old backups based on retention settings.

follow_symlinks.description: Follow symbolic links when scanning directories.

confirm_destructive_source.description: Prompt for confirmation before overwriting source files.

confirm_destructive_target.description: Prompt for confirmation before overwriting target files.

show_diff_threshold.description: Show diff for files larger than this many lines.

detect_renames.description: Detect when files have been renamed.

rename_similarity_threshold.description: Similarity threshold for rename detection (0.0 to 1.0). 1.0 requires exact content match.

exclude_rulesets.description: Reusable sets of exclude glob patterns that tools can reference by name.

additionalProperties.description: A named list of glob patterns to exclude.

tools.description: Per-tool configuration. Each key is the tool name.

propagate.description: Rules for copying files between tools with optional transformations.

enabled.description: Whether this tool is enabled for sync.

source.description: Source directory path (supports ~ for home directory).

target.description: Target directory path (supports ~ for home directory).

include.description: Glob patterns for files to include in sync.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for files to exclude from sync. Merged with patterns from exclude_rulesets.

exclude_rulesets.description: Names of exclude rulesets to apply (defined in top-level exclude_rulesets).

special_handling.description: File-specific extraction rules (e.g. sync only certain JSON keys).

specialHandling.description: Special handling rules for a specific file.

include_keys.description: JSON keys to extract from the file.

exclude_patterns.description: Patterns to exclude within the special handling.

propagationRule.description: A rule for copying files between tools. Specify either source_tool + source_file (tool-relative) or source_path (absolute).

source_tool.description: Name of the source tool (must be defined in tools section).

source_file.description: File path relative to the source tool's target directory.

source_path.description: Absolute file or directory path (supports ~). Use for source-to-source copies without tool definitions.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude when propagating directories.

targets.description: Destination targets for this propagation rule.

propagationTarget.description: A propagation destination. Specify either tool + target_file (tool-relative) or dest_path (absolute).

tool.description: Name of the destination tool (must be defined in tools section).

target_file.description: File path relative to the destination tool's target directory.

file_pattern.description: Glob pattern to match files within a directory source.

transforms.description: Transformations to apply to the content after copying.

transform.description: A content transformation to apply during propagation.

pattern.description: A sed-style substitution pattern (e.g. 's/old/new/g'). Required when type is 'sed'.

sections.description: Section names to remove. For 'remove_xml_sections': XML tag names. For 'remove_markdown_sections': heading text.
